nasb.text: Many waters cannot quench love, Nor will rivers overflow it; If a man were to give all the riches of his house for love, It would be utterly despised.”

esv.text: Many waters cannot quench love, neither can floods drown it. If a man offered for love all the wealth of his house, he would be utterly despised.

cnv.text: 愛情，眾水不能熄滅， 洪流不能淹沒； 如果有人拿自己家裡所有的財產去換取愛情， 就必被藐視。

ccb.text: 爱情，大水不能熄灭， 江河不能淹没。 若有人想倾其家财买爱情， 必遭唾弃。
